Home · Terms of Use

Terms of Use

Last updated: [DATE]
Legal review required. These Terms are a working draft. They should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel in Qatar before being relied upon as a binding legal document.

1. Acceptance

By accessing or using this website (the "Site") operated by Nasser Al Ali Enterprises ("we", "us", "our"), you agree to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the Site.

2. About us

Nasser Al Ali Enterprises is a Qatar-registered heavy-construction and contracting company. Commercial Registration: [CR number - to be provided]. Office: Salwa Road, Building-155, Zone 43, Doha, State of Qatar. Postal: P.O. Box 13115, Doha, Qatar.

3. Use of the Site

You may browse the Site for lawful business and informational purposes. You must not:

  • Use the Site in any way that breaches applicable law in Qatar or your jurisdiction.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the Site, its servers, serverless functions, or connected systems.
  • Introduce malware, viruses, or any code that could damage the Site or its users.
  • Upload malicious, unlawful, or harmful files via any form or upload on the Site.
  • Copy, scrape, mirror, or reproduce substantial parts of the Site without our written consent.
  • Misrepresent your identity when contacting us or submitting information.
  • Attempt to abuse the AI chat assistant to generate spam, illegal content, or bulk queries.

4. Content and intellectual property

All content on this Site - including text, logos, images, project photography, videos, code, and design elements - is the property of Nasser Al Ali Enterprises or its licensors and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other applicable laws. Client and partner logos remain the property of their respective owners and are shown with attribution.

You may share links to the Site and print pages for internal business reference. Any other use - including commercial reuse, republishing, or the training of machine-learning models - requires prior written permission.

5. AI chat assistant - no professional advice

Our AI-powered chat assistant is provided as an informational aid only. Its responses are generated by a third-party language model (Google Gemini) using our approved knowledge base. Despite our efforts to keep the knowledge base accurate:

  • The assistant may occasionally produce incomplete, out-of-date, or incorrect answers ("hallucinations").
  • The assistant is not a substitute for professional engineering, legal, financial, or contractual advice.
  • The assistant does not issue quotations, prices, or binding commitments on behalf of Nasser Al Ali Enterprises.
  • Always confirm binding information with our team directly by phone, email, or a signed written contract.

Do not share sensitive personal information (identification numbers, health data, financial credentials, etc.) via the chat assistant.

6. Enquiries, quotes, and lead capture

Any pricing, timeline, or scope discussion via the Site (including via the chat assistant, RFQ form, appointment booking, contact form, or email) is indicative only and does not constitute a binding offer. Binding terms are set out only in a signed written contract issued by Nasser Al Ali Enterprises.

7. Uploads and file submissions

If you upload files (CVs, drawings, BOQs, or other documents), you confirm that:

  • You have the right to share them with us.
  • They are free of malware and do not infringe any third-party rights.
  • You accept that these files will be processed on our behalf by Netlify and stored for the retention period stated in our Privacy Policy.

8. Third-party services and links

The Site links to or embeds third-party platforms (WhatsApp, Facebook, Google Maps, Calendly, Google Gemini). We are not responsible for their content, availability, or privacy practices. Your use of those services is governed by their own terms.

9. Disclaimer

The Site is provided "as is" and "as available". To the fullest extent permitted by Qatari law, we make no warranties as to accuracy, completeness, uninterrupted availability, or fitness for a particular purpose. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Site (in whole or in part) at any time without notice.

10. Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Nasser Al Ali Enterprises, its directors, employees, and affiliates will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive loss arising out of your use of the Site or reliance on its content, including reliance on any output from the AI chat assistant. Our total liability arising out of these Terms, for any cause, is limited to QAR 1,000.

11. Governing law and jurisdiction

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Qatar. Any dispute arising in connection with the Site or these Terms will be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Qatar.

12. Changes

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

13. Contact

For questions about these Terms: info@nasseralaligroup.com · +974 6655 7728 · Salwa Road, Building-155, Zone 43, Doha, State of Qatar · P.O. Box 13115, Doha, Qatar.
